This field is calculated using the source PDE field for the days supply of the medication 
(DAYS_SUPLY_NUM) The Part D standardized fill count does not indicate the number of different drugs 
the person is using, only the total months covered by a medication (e.g., if a patient is receiving a full 
year supply of a medication, whether this occurs in one transaction or 12 monthly transactions, the fill
